message:
fix(sync): extend waiter ID wrapping_add to mpsc channel and OnceCell

Apply the same overflow-prevention fix from the Mutex/RwLock commit to
two additional sites that increment waiter IDs without wrapping:

- channel/mpsc.rs: Reserve<T>::poll wraps next_waiter_id with
  wrapping_add(1) when assigning monotonic IDs to send waiters
- sync/once_cell.rs: OnceCell<T>::get_or_init wraps at both the
  re-registration path (dequeued while waiting) and the first-time
  waiter creation path

These prevent panics in long-running systems where channels or OnceCell
initializations accumulate billions of waiter registrations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
